text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, when I'm strolling around<n>town, I spot
Matikanefukukitaru<n>rolling a die rather earnestly.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, a two... An even number<n>means choosing
the street on the left!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Oh! Hey there, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Well you see... last night, a<n>divine revelation
appeared in my<n>dreams!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It just so happens that there's a<n>new, super
strong sacred site around<n>here right now! But its
power will only<n>last a short time.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Directions did not come included with<n>the
revelation, but that's no problem!<n>For this lucky
die will lead me to the<n>promised land!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...First, it seems to have led me right<n>to you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... This can be no mere<n>coincidence! I
presume this means<n>you will be the one to guide
me to the<n>site!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Please, Trainer! Throw the die and<n>show me the
way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit too late to turn her down, so<n>I guess I'll
give it a go...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
A three! An odd number means we<n>go down the
street on the right...<n>That's the way to the station!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
So fate desires us to take the train!<n>Come on, let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! I can feel it! We're getting<n>closer to the
sacred site! Isn't this<n>exciting?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now to find out which station to get<n>off at. Let us
consult the die!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A one would mean the next station, a<n>two the
station after that, and so on...<n>A six would take us
to the very last<n>stop. I roll the die on the palm of
my<n>hand, which gives me...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: A one! Then we need to get off at the<n>next sta—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The train suddenly lurches, causing<n>the die to
tumble out of my hand.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Now it's a six!
choice_data_list: Which one do we go with?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hm... This is quite the predicament!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, you always lead me down<n>the right path!
So please, I ask for you<n>to make the final decision!
choice_data_list: One. Let's get off at the next station.
Six. Let's stay on until the final stop.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Understood! I can't wait to see what<n>we find!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, so this is the sacred site! The<n>mystic energy
here is off the charts!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like any other part of town to<n>me, but we
roll the die and keep on<n>walking.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Look at that sign! "Holy Smokes<n>Steakhouse"! Is
this one of the<n>area's local delights?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect name for a sacred<n>site! Let's go
see what they have!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, should I eat seven skewers for<n>luck? Or
maybe eight for prosperity!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! Check out that big sculpture in<n>front of the
museum!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Wow, it's reflecting so much light! So<n>sparkly! I
bet it's supercharged with<n>the sun's energy, right
down to the<n>core!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Why don't we try touching it for<n>some of that
power! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Aaaand touch!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Whew! What a day! I had so much<n>fun!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm ready to take on the world! Now<n>that's the
power of visiting a<n>supercharged, limited-time-only
sacred site!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Um... How was today for you,<n>Trainer? I ended up
dragging you<n>around all day...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
R-really? I'm happy to hear that! Plus,<n>we got
ourselves a whole lot of<n>power!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
There didn't seem to be anything<n>miraculous
about today's events, but<n>Matikanefukukitaru and
I had a great<n>time regardless.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I wouldn't mind if more divine<n>revelations
like this came my way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Well, maybe I shouldn't get too<n>greedy.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But... it'd be nice to enjoy ourselves<n>like that
every once in a while.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, maybe I'll ask Shiraoki for<n>another
revelation before bed tonight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Understood! Onward! With you by my<n>side, I can
travel to the ends of the<n>earth!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We get off at the last stop to find an<n>open, serene
landscape expanding<n>into the horizon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Mmm! The air here is so clean and<n>crisp! Even the
great outdoors is<n>flush with power!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I think we're onto something<n>wonderful! Let's go,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I roll the die under her expectant gaze,<n>and we
press on diligently. And on,<n>and on, and on...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ah, looks like this is the end of the<n>road!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I think this might just be it—the<n>supercharged,
limited-time-only<n>sacred site! Now what miracles
await<n>us?!
choice_data_list: Do you really expect a miracle to happen?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You're the one who led us<n>here, after
all!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She says this with a smile so bright it<n>makes me
hopeful for a miracle<n>myself.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh?! Wh-what was that sound?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
T-Trainer! Look up at the sky! Some<n>kind of light is
coming this way!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: H-huh?! Whaaa—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A dazzling light, followed by a<n>thunderous clap,
seizes all my<n>senses...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Did... d-did you see that, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: It was a UFO!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It had to be! That was a gift—power<n>from the
cosmos!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I wasn't able to see it clearly for<n>myself, but if
she's happy, who am I<n>to argue?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You really are my destined partner!<n>What an
auspicious event your<n>guidance has brought upon
us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure more amazing things are in<n>store for us if
we stick together!<n>Don't you think?
